violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Vacuum sealed ready-to-eat summer sausage stored a rack under pre-cooked vacuum sealed chicken breast. Advise putting ready-to-eat summer sausage above chicken.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates are stored upward under a fan mounted on the wall. -Some plates in server station of the steak house have build up on their edges.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
